clinical_workflow.intended_use: Clinician-controlled documentation scaffold for alcohol intake documentation.
clinical_workflow.not_for: Not for autonomous diagnosis, treatment selection, dosing, disposition, admission/discharge, procedural, imaging, referral, or emergency management decisions.

source_phase1.reason_for_inclusion: Common General Medicine / GP documentation scenario suitable as clinician-controlled note scaffolding rather than autonomous clinical advice.
source_phase1.distinct_purpose: Distinct documentation workflow for clinician-selected details around alcohol intake documentation.
source_phase1.duplicate_check_notes: Cleaned Phase 1 candidate. Exact ID is unique within this revised index and must be checked against existing_workflow_ids.json and alias inventory before import; no close baseline workflow assigned in this cleaned index.

safety_notes: No autonomous diagnosis or treatment recommendation is intended.
Red flags are documentation prompts only.
red_flag_prompts: severe or rapidly worsening symptoms documented if assessed
abnormal vital signs documented if measured
new neurological, cardiorespiratory, or systemic concern documented if assessed
clinician concern requiring escalation documented if present

chips.text: Alcohol intake documentation context documented
chips.evidence_relationship: The exact WHO manual supports documenting that alcohol use was reviewed in primary care without implying a positive screen or alcohol-related diagnosis.

history_draft.text: Patient presents for alcohol intake documentation documentation. [Onset/duration]. [Symptom context]. [Associated symptoms reviewed]. [Relevant negatives]. [Patient concerns/goals]. [Additional history].

exam_prompts.text: Documented if assessed or measured. Vital signs documented.
Documented if assessed or measured. General appearance documented.
Documented if assessed or measured. Focused system examination documented.
Documented if assessed or measured. Relevant negatives if assessed documented.

investigation_options.text: Reviewed if relevant. Reviewed. Clinician-entered Relevant observations reviewed.
Reviewed if relevant. Reviewed. Clinician-entered Laboratory results reviewed.
Reviewed if relevant. Reviewed. Clinician-entered Existing reports or records reviewed.

plan_options.text: Safety-netting documented if discussed by clinician.
Follow-up documented if arranged by clinician.
Patient questions or counseling discussion documented if discussed.

clinical_blockers: Exact beverage, quantity, frequency, timing, standard-drink conversion, AUDIT responses, score, pregnancy, withdrawal, diagnosis, counselling, referral, and follow-up remain unsupported.
Any legacy item not explicitly mapped to an exact section remains unsupported pending qualified clinician review.
No mapping authorises an automatic diagnosis, differential, investigation, management decision, medicine, dose, procedure, referral, urgency conclusion, discharge decision, or patient instruction.
